ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time when the match was played */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed, canceled) */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "home_team_possession" INTEGER /* Home team's possession percentage */,
  "away_team_possession" INTEGER /* Away team's possession percentage */,
  "home_team_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the home team */,
  "away_team_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the team (e.g., TB for Thunderbirds) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home stadium */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team's uniform */,
  "team_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match official */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the official is assigned to */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the match official */,
  "official_role" TEXT /* Role of the match official (e.g., referee, umpire) */,
  "official_email" TEXT /* Email address of the match official */,
  "official_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the match official */,
  "official_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "stadium_location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "stadium_opened_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was opened */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "coach_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "coach_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, midfielder) */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who scored the goal */,
  "goal_time" TEXT /* Time of the goal during the match */,
  "is_own_goal" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the goal was an own goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, team manager, match official) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
